name: houzs-erp
description: Houzs Century ERP — Cloudflare Workers backend + React/Vite frontend. Each sub-app (backend/, frontend/) has its own package.json and deploys itself.

scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:frontend && npm run deploy:backend
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
